```output
      1 a
      1 and
      1 be
      1 can
      1 count
      1 in
      1 is
      1 it
      1 look
      1 most
      1 often
      1 our
      1 out
      1 script
      1 see
      1 small
      1 some
      1 them
      1 to
      1 trying
      1 useful
      1 very
      1 we
      1 which
      1 will
      2 are
      2 file
      2 for
      2 this
      3 repeated
      3 words
```
